final_chunks.text:
MARKET INTERACTION WITH LIQUIDITY ZONES
The market first trades down into the sell-side liquidity, running through it. Then, it rallies back up, clearing the equal highs where buy stops have been taken. At both of these price points, where liquidity is swept, we anticipate a market structure shift.
final_chunks.source: 2022 ICT Mentorship Episode 3_Handbook.blocks.json

final_chunks.text:
FALSE BREAKOUT AND LIQUIDITY TARGETS
Look to go short there, expecting that move above an old high to be a false breakout. The market would then reprice lower to some lower level liquidity reference point, such as running below another old low, a bullish order block, or closing in a fair value gap.
final_chunks.source: ICT Mentorship Core Content - Month 04 - Liquidity Pools_Handbook.blocks.json

final_chunks.section_title: JUDAS SWING AND LIQUIDITY TARGETS FOR SHORT BIAS
final_chunks.text:
JUDAS SWING AND LIQUIDITY TARGETS FOR SHORT BIAS
The ideal scenario for shorts involved price running into specific liquidity.
final_chunks.source: 2023 ICT Mentorship - Opening Range Gap Repricing Macro_Handbook.blocks.json

final_chunks.text:
ENGINEERING LONG LIQUIDITY
When bearish, we anticipate manipulation. The form of manipulation we expect to see is engineering long liquidity. This involves a quick, sudden movement higher to entice breakout artists who want to buy. They will be placed on the wrong side of the marketplace.
final_chunks.source: ICT Forex - Accumulation - Manipulation - Distribution_Handbook.blocks.json

final_chunks.text:
ENGINEERING SHORT LIQUIDITY
When anticipating a bullish range expansion to the upside (a higher close), we hunt for a manipulation cycle immediately after the opening price.
final_chunks.source: ICT Forex - Accumulation - Manipulation - Distribution_Handbook.blocks.json

final_chunks.text:
DEFINITION AND IMPORTANCE
A reversal is when price moves in the opposite direction of the current trend. When looking for reversals, we directly couple that with ICT tools of liquidity pools. When price reverses direction, it indicates that the market makers have run levels of stops.
final_chunks.source: ICT Mentorship Core Content - Month 1 - Elements Of A Trade Setup_Handbook.blocks.json

final_chunks.section_title: INDICATORS VS. MARKET MAKERS AND LIQUIDITY
final_chunks.text:
INDICATORS VS. MARKET MAKERS AND LIQUIDITY
Indicators have no reflection on future market movement; price has no awareness of indicators. We reverse-engineer this thought process using the market efficiency paradigm. Liquidity can be engineered or neutralized by market makers.
final_chunks.source: ICT Mentorship Core Content - Month 04 - Divergence Phantoms_Handbook.blocks.json

final_chunks.text:
COMMERCIAL POSITIONING AND LIQUIDITY
Commercials pair orders above an old high where there's a high pool of liquid participants willing to buy. Buy stops are triggered for short holders, and breakout artists buy the breakout.
final_chunks.source: ICT Charter Price Action Model #4 Supplementary Lesson_Handbook.blocks.json

final_chunks.text:
ENGINEERING LIQUIDITY FOR COUNTER-MOVES
For the PM session, the market is likely to pull back up into a premium. If the market is moving from a high down to a target (as it did in the morning), and smart money sold short, they will now be covering their When smart money buys at a discount (e. g.
final_chunks.source: 2022 ICT Mentorship Episode 16_Handbook.blocks.json

final_chunks.text:
INSTITUTIONAL ENGINEERING OF BREAKERS
The market's initial drop below the resistance level serves to lull retail traders into believing a breakdown is imminent, prompting them to go short. Their buy stops would be placed just above that initial short-term high.
final_chunks.source: ICT Mentorship Core Content - Month 05 - Defining Institutional Swing Points_Handbook.blocks.json

final_chunks.text:
WEEKLY BIAS AND LIQUIDITY ENGINEERING
Now, the foundations and underlying framework is: we're in a market that's weekly bearish, we're expecting that weekly candle to expand lower. It's been expanding all week, so we have momentum on our side.
final_chunks.source: 2022 ICT Mentorship Episode 2_Handbook.blocks.json

final_chunks.section_title: ENGINEERED PRICE DELIVERY AND LIQUIDITY GRABS
final_chunks.text:
ENGINEERED PRICE DELIVERY AND LIQUIDITY GRABS
Does that look random to you, or is it like it's engineered, coded, scripted, authored. You can see that 15,289 and a quarter level, that's an actual low right there.
final_chunks.source: ICT Mentorship 2023 - July 07, 2023 Live NQ Futures Trading_Handbook.blocks.json

final_chunks.section_title: SMART MONEY UTILIZATION OF BUY-SIDE LIQUIDITY
final_chunks.text:
SMART MONEY UTILIZATION OF BUY-SIDE LIQUIDITY
At 3:00 PM, when the market trades above previous highs, the protective buy stops from short positions transform into a 'rushing liquidity wave' of willing buyers at the market.
final_chunks.source: 2022 ICT Mentorship Episode 32_Handbook.blocks.json

final_chunks.text:
BEARISH BREAKER
For the highest precision with the breaker, there are two stages of liquidity: The short-term buy-side liquidity above the short-term high. Price will then want to reach into a higher timeframe buy-side liquidity. One waits to see if price runs away from that level.
final_chunks.source: ICT Mentorship 2023 - Advanced Theory On ICT Breaker_Handbook.blocks.json

final_chunks.text:
LIQUIDITY DELIVERY
The 9:50-10:10 AM macro is observed after initial liquidity (buy side) has been engaged.
final_chunks.source: ICT Mentorship 2023 - Algorithmic Price Delivery & Time Macros Intro_Handbook.blocks.json

final_chunks.section_title: MARKET LIQUIDITY AND SMART MONEY DYNAMICS
final_chunks.source: ICT Mentorship Core Content - Month 05 - Defining HTF PD Arrays_Handbook.blocks.json

final_chunks.text:
OFFSET DISTRIBUTION MODEL
Engineering buy side liquidity offset distribution. IPTA will reprice the market above an old High to promote buy stops to Market orders that would be residing there for current short holders. This in essence Engineers buyers at premium prices.
final_chunks.source: ICT Mentorship Core Content - Month 09 - Bread & Butter Sell Setups_Handbook.blocks.json

final_chunks.text:
BULLISH BREAKER
The concepts are reversible for a bullish scenario. A bullish breaker can be a reversal pattern or a continuation in an existing bull market.
final_chunks.source: ICT Mentorship 2023 - Advanced Theory On ICT Breaker_Handbook.blocks.json

final_chunks.text:
ENGINEERING LIQUIDITY
This is inducing shorts, so it engineers liquidity. Even if the idea is that they want to take the market down to this level, if it's been consolidating, I like to see them do this type of move here where it drops down first. It's kind of like a sucker play.
final_chunks.source: 2022 ICT Mentorship Episode 2_Handbook.blocks.json

final_chunks.section_title: LIQUIDITY RUN FROM BREAKER TO IMBALANCE
final_chunks.text:
LIQUIDITY RUN FROM BREAKER TO IMBALANCE
The perceived support at relative equal lows accumulates sell-side liquidity. The market runs from the breaker down into this liquidity, hitting it and trading into an imbalance (which is A nice retracement into this FVG occurs, followed by a sharp delivery.
final_chunks.source: ICT Mentorship 2023 - ES Review Precision Results_Handbook.blocks.json

final_chunks.text:
LIQUIDITY AND INEFFICIENCY
To take out buy stops (above old highs) or sell stops (below old lows). To trade into some form of inefficiency (a Fair Value Gap). This is not due to 'buying pressure' or 'selling pressure.
final_chunks.source: Thursday June 15, 2023 ⧹ ICT Price Action Workshop_Handbook.blocks.json

final_chunks.section_title: THE CONSOLIDATION-EXPANSION CYCLE AND LIQUIDITY TARGETS
final_chunks.text:
THE CONSOLIDATION-EXPANSION CYCLE AND LIQUIDITY TARGETS
The market operates in cycles of consolidation (often around equilibrium) and expansion. When price enters the 62 percent retracement level (discount) and then returns to equilibrium, it frequently consolidates before a subsequent expansion.
final_chunks.source: ICT Mentorship Core Content - Month 1 - Equilibrium Vs. Discount_Handbook.blocks.json

final_chunks.text:
HOMEWORK AND PREPARATORY STUDY
Homework was assigned on the community tab. It involved reviewing a specific chart to identify reasons for a market structure shift and locate buy-side and sell-side liquidity.
final_chunks.source: 2022 ICT Mentorship Episode 3_Handbook.blocks.json

final_chunks.section_title: IDENTIFYING REVERSAL CATALYSTS AND PRICE BEHAVIOR
final_chunks.text:
IDENTIFYING REVERSAL CATALYSTS AND PRICE BEHAVIOR
The focus is on the specific price range and the decline into the daily bullish order block mean threshold, Key observation: price demonstrates an unwillingness to exit the premium market.
final_chunks.source: ICT Mentorship Core Content - Month 07 - Intraweek Market Reversals & Overlapping Models_Handbook.blocks.json

final_chunks.text:
NEUTRALIZING LONG LIQUIDITY
Another form of manipulation in bullish conditions is neutralizing long liquidity. This means individuals who are already long or recently bought near the opening price have their positions upset by the drop below the opening price.
final_chunks.source: ICT Forex - Accumulation - Manipulation - Distribution_Handbook.blocks.json

final_chunks.text:
WEEKLY RANGE AND LIQUIDITY ENGINEERING
So, we're looking at the daily chart, we're going to drop down into the hourly chart. Now what I have here is a framework for looking at the weekly range on an hourly chart.
final_chunks.source: 2022 ICT Mentorship Episode 2_Handbook.blocks.json

final_chunks.text:
LIQUIDITY HUNT
The objective was to see a specific low taken out. This area held 'buy-side' liquidity, which are buy stops typically targeted by breakout traders using trend lines. The strategy involved taking the buy-side first, then running the 'sell-side relative equal lows'.
final_chunks.source: 2023 ICT Mentorship - Review Of The Interactive Study 090123 NFP NQ Short_Handbook.blocks.json

final_chunks.text:
DISPLACEMENT TOWARDS LIQUIDITY
When observing price, look for decisive displacement, not just a drift. Price indicates it is reaching for something, specifically the liquidity resting below old lows.
final_chunks.source: ICT Institutional Price Action： Micro-Market Structure & Time & Price Concepts Part 02_Handbook.blocks.json

final_chunks.section_title: BUY SIDE LIQUIDITY AND OFFSET DISTRIBUTION
final_chunks.text:
BUY SIDE LIQUIDITY AND OFFSET DISTRIBUTION
The buy side was outlined across various highs. A previous tweet noted a lack of runs on liquidity, indicating that liquidity is being stacked up.
final_chunks.source: ICT Mentorship 2023 - ES Market Review May 17, 2023_Handbook.blocks.json

final_chunks.text:
RECAPITALIZATION AND LIQUIDITY SEEKING
Price trades from the bodies of the candles into specific areas, actively seeking liquidity below all the bodies of the candles and wicks. This action effectively recapitalizes an order block.
final_chunks.source: ICT Mentorship Core Content - Month 03 - Institutional Order Flow_Handbook.blocks.json

final_chunks.text:
EXTERNAL RANGE LIQUIDITY
External range liquidity is found outside the current trading range: Buy side liquidity is located above the Range High. Sell side liquidity is located below the Range Low. Runs on liquidity seek to pair orders with pending order liquidity, which forms a liquidity pool.
final_chunks.source: ICT Mentorship Core Content - Month 04 - Reinforcing Liquidity Concepts & Price Delivery_Handbook.blocks.json

final_chunks.text:
STAGE 1: PREPARATION
Identify where price is likely to trade next (below which old low or above which old high).
final_chunks.source: ICT Charter Price Action Model 12 - Trade Plan & Algorithmic Theory_Handbook.blocks.json

final_chunks.section_title: OPEN FLOAT AND SELL SIDE LIQUIDITY POOLS
final_chunks.text:
OPEN FLOAT AND SELL SIDE LIQUIDITY POOLS
When examining the sell side of liquidity, the open float includes: Protective sell stops placed by longs under the last bullish shift. Sell stops positioned below short-term lows, which can be weekly or monthly lows.
final_chunks.source: ICT Mentorship Core Content - Month 05 - Open Float_Handbook.blocks.json

final_chunks.text:
TARGETING PRIOR DAY'S LIQUIDITY
A short term scalp is a very simple approach to running out previous day's highs or previous day's lows. That's all it is. We're targeting buy stops above the previous day's high or a day or two ago. We're always going to be looking back the last three days.
final_chunks.source: ICT - Mastering High Probability Scalping Vol. 1 of 3_Handbook.blocks.json

final_chunks.text:
TARGETS FOR SELL-SIDE LIQUIDITY
The market would go into a specific area but not trade to the top of a particular candle. Price would draw down into and beyond previously identified levels. Underneath the existing low and relative equal lows, there resides sell-side liquidity, which was a target.
final_chunks.source: 2022 ICT Mentorship Episode 25_Handbook.blocks.json

final_chunks.text:
LOCATING LIQUIDITY POOLS THROUGH ROLE-PLAYING
Above old highs, there is a pool or collection of orders that traders build up around. Most retail traders are unaware of other traders' actions, thinking myopically about themselves.
final_chunks.source: ICT Mentorship Core Content - Month 04 - Liquidity Pools_Handbook.blocks.json

final_chunks.section_title: DEFINING LIQUIDITY POOLS AND ENTRY LOGIC FRAMEWORK
final_chunks.text:
DEFINING LIQUIDITY POOLS AND ENTRY LOGIC FRAMEWORK
It doesn't need to trade to the absolute highest target to be profitable; that target represents the best-case The next step is to draw the buy side and sell side liquidity pools. I will show the framework for the logic behind the entry point.
final_chunks.source: 2022 ICT Mentorship Episode 26 - Example Of Tape Reading Practice_Handbook.blocks.json

final_chunks.text:
LIQUIDITY AND BIG FIGURES
The true framework for targeting is the liquidity residing above the old high and the significant big figure levels. It's not about demanding an absolute high; there are tools and techniques for that, but it's beyond the scope of this YouTube video series.
final_chunks.source: OTE Pattern Recognition Series - Vol. 10_Handbook.blocks.json

final_chunks.section_title: LIQUIDITY VOID AND POTENTIAL RE-ENTRY STRATEGY
final_chunks.text:
LIQUIDITY VOID AND POTENTIAL RE-ENTRY STRATEGY
A small gap exists, representing a real liquidity void. Price is expected to eventually return to fill this gap. There is an intention to buy more if price trades back into this liquidity void.
final_chunks.source: 5 Handle Twitter Example Live Execution... January 30, 2023_Handbook.blocks.json
